message: Hey Mr. Miller, what’s a Guidance Counsellor? I have a meeting with one but I’m not really sure what they do.
A Guidance Counsellor is someone at school who helps students with academic planning, career decisions, or personal challenges.

trueDialog.message: – If there’s anything in that definition you’re not sure about, the words will usually be highlighted and you can hover to get the definition or use %key:general:left% and %key:general:right% to select it. For example try highlighting the highlighted word: Guidance Counsellor. –

falseDialog.message: – If there’s anything in that definition you’re not sure about, the words will usually be highlighted and you can hover to get the definition. For example try hovering over the highlighted word: Guidance Counsellor. –

message: – If you forget and want to look up the definition again, you can find it in your dictionary app on your phone. –
Oh cool. I’ll add that to my phone on my dictionary app so I can check any words that I'm not sure of later.

actions.title: You Unlocked the Dictionary App!
actions.description: Any definitions for highlighted words can be found in the dictionary app!
